meaning: n.[生]有丝分裂原,促细胞分裂剂,分裂素
examples: The extracellular signal-regulated kinase(ERK) is an important member of mitogen-activated protein kinase(MAPK) family.
Mutations in GNA11 induced spontaneously metastasizing tumors in a mouse model and activated the mitogen-activated protein kinase pathway.
To investigate the expression and activation of mitogen-activated protein kinases in non-small cell lung cancer and its clinical significance.
AstraZeneca is in midstage trials with 180 melanoma patients for a drug that hits a related target called mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase.
AstraZeneca (nyse: AZN - news - people ) is in midstage trials with 180 melanoma patients for a drug that hits a related target called mitogen-activated protein kinase kinase.
